problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Sleep-dependent. Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
